zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Lawton於1481年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，她的父親William Lawton15歲，母親Cinlislmi Lawton15歲。她於1500年與Robert Caldwell在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1511年在英國英格蘭享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Lawton于1481年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾时，她的父亲William Lawton15岁，母亲Cinlislmi Lawton15岁。她于1500年与Robert Caldwell在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1511年在英国英格兰享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lawton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name, from Church Lawton in Cheshire, which is recorded as Lautune in 1086. The placename derives from Old English hlāw ‘mound, hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Louton
meanings: English: habitational name from Lowton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English hlāw ‘mound, hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There may well have been some confusion with Lawton .

variants.name: Laughton
meanings: habitational name from Laughton en le Morthen in Yorkshire, Laughton in Leicestershire or any of the two places called Laughton in Lincolnshire (one near Gainsborough and another near Folkingham). The places are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, meaning ‘village or farm where leeks are grown’. It may sometimes have alternated with Leighton , which is mostly from placenames with the same etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Lawton was born in 1481, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Lawton, was 15 and her mother, Cinlislmi Lawton, was 15. She married Robert Caldwell in 1500, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1511, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Lawton est née en 1481, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lawton, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Cinlislmi Lawton, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Caldwell en 1500, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1511, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Lawton 1481 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Lawton 15 und ihre Mutter Cinlislmi Lawton 15. Sie hat 1500 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Caldwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1511 im Alter von 30 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Lawton è nata il nel 1481 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Lawton, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Cinlislmi Lawton, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Robert Caldwell nel 1500, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1511, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Lawton(이)가 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Lawton(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cinlislmi Lawton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Robert Caldwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Lawton nasceu em 1481, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Lawton, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Cinlislmi Lawton, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Caldwell em 1500, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1511, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Lawton родилась в 1481 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Lawton было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Cinlislmi Lawton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Caldwell в 1500 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1511 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Lawton nació en 1481, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Lawton, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Cinlislmi Lawton, tenía 15 años.
